```
    static private int readBitsForS16(int[] in, final int inIntOffset,
                final int inWithIntOffset, final int bits) {
                final int val = (in[inIntOffset] >>> inWithIntOffset);
                return val & (0xffffffff >>> (32 - bits));
        }
```
